name: Mr. Woodpecker
short_description: You play as a detective investigating an empty hotel. You are close to solving the mystery of this hotel. Explore the rooms, look for items that will help you pass on. And do not forget to read the tips of the detective, for whom you play will periodically give out.
detailed_description:
Mr. Woodpecker - 3D Arcade game in genre Find and Click. You play as a detective investigating an empty hotel. You are close to solving the mystery of this hotel. Explore the rooms, look for items that will help you pass on. And do not forget to read the tips of the detective, for whom you play will periodically give out.
The pleasant atmosphere of the deserted mansion beckons with its mystery, which is just waiting to be revealed.
Attractive lighting from fireplaces and lamps create a feeling of comfort and warmth. Intuitive controls allow you to immediately immerse yourself in the game. And the character's hints allow you not to get stuck in the plot.
